nasb.text: Then you shall make its lamps seven in number; and they shall mount its lamps so as to shed light on the space in front of it.

esv.text: You shall make seven lamps for it. And the lamps shall be set up so as to give light on the space in front of it.

cnv.text: 你要做燈臺上的七個燈盞，這些燈盞要放在燈臺之上，使燈光照亮對面的地方。

ccb.text: 此外，要为灯台造七个灯盏，放在灯台上面，照亮前面的地方。
